problem: Per-batch gradient noise has both 'curl' (data-pair disagreement) and 'gradient' (consistent loss-descent) components; standard SGD uses raw gradient and cannot suppress curl-rich noise. Need a decomposition that exposes the components.
sub_problems: P1: Hodge-style gradient decomposition over batch
